name: 05_js_database_ssl_nested
description: Upstream nests connection; fork added sslCert on flat object (scenario 4)
goose_prompt_control: There is a merge conflict in database.js. Place sslCert inside the upstream connection object. Do not leave conflict markers.
goose_prompt_experiment: There is a merge conflict in database.js. Merge fork sslCert with upstream nested connection structure. Do not leave conflict markers.
